# gcore_storage_locations (Data Source)

Locations represent cloud regions where new storages can be created.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "gcore_storage_locations" "example_storage_locations" {

}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `max_items` (Number) Max items to fetch, default: 1000
- `order_by` (String)

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) The items returned by the data source (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) Full hostname/address for accessing the storage endpoint.
- `name` (String) Human-readable display name for the location.
- `technical_name` (String) Internal technical identifier for the location
- `title` (String) Display title for the location (English). Null if no title is set.
- `type` (String) Storage type supported by this location
Available values: "s3_compatible", "sftp".
